benchmarks.name: quality_2sent
benchmarks.prompt: Summarize why caching is useful in web services in exactly two sentences.

all_runs.response_preview: aching stores frequently requested data to reduce the load on backend servers and minimize response times for users. This approach significantly improves overall application scalability and performance by serving responses from memory rather than recalculating or re-fetching data for every request.
